libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system-property setup is required. The observed javac failure is an API/package change: org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.Iterables is no longer in janino 3.1.0; the related class is in org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator.Iterables via the already-transitive commons-compiler dependency. Prefer covering public Janino APIs such as SimpleCompiler, ExpressionEvaluator, ScriptEvaluator, ClassBodyEvaluator, and CompilerFactory rather than relying on removed internal utility packages.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Adding an explicit org.codehaus.janino:commons-compiler dependency is redundant for normal Gradle/Maven usage because janino 3.1.0 already declares it as a regular dependency.
Janino has an optional/provided Ant integration dependency; do not test AntCompilerAdapter unless the workflow intentionally adds Ant, because it is not needed for meaningful core Janino coverage.
Native Image may still expose Janino dynamic class-loading limitations, so local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Janino 3.1.0 is an in-process Java compiler/evaluator library; its normal APIs are reachable with the janino artifact and its transitive commons-compiler dependency, with no Docker service, environment variable, system property, or extra Maven dependency required.
